title: Ability to communicate in a Workspace Discussion/chat area outside of Boards
excerpt: It would help to have a discussion area for all members in a workspace to allow for communication outside of Boards.

posts.author: beatriz.perez (Beatriz Perez)
posts.cookedHtml: It would help to have a discussion area for all members in a workspace to allow for communication outside of Boards.

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello @beatriz.perez this is a good idea, did you mean to add it as a Feature request we could UpVote?

posts.author: beatriz.perez (Beatriz Perez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for pointing that out, Clare.
I’ve posted it as a feature request. Here’s the link: Workspace Discussion/Chat area outside of Boards - Feature requests - monday Community Forum
